revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{link note|note={{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | S | s }}ubscription or [https://www.oxforddnb.com/help/subscribe#public UK public library membership] required{{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | . | }}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{link note|note={{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | S | s }}ubscription or [https://www.oxforddnb.com/help/subscribe#public UK public library membership] required{{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | . | }}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{link note|note={{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | S | s }}ubscription or [https://www.oxforddnb.com/help/subscribe#public UK public library membership] required{{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | . | }}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23520214635|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{link note|note={{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | S | s }}ubscription or [https://www.oxforddnb.com/help/subscribe#public UK public library membership] required{{#ifeq: {{{sentence|no}}} | yes | . | }}}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
